sprint.name: Forge Expansion Sprint
sprint.note: A scheduled review is not a guaranteed release. The forge publishes at most one coherent change when it clears the quality and safety gates; otherwise it skips the window.
sprint.secondaryAutomation: A separate GitHub Actions workflow runs Tuesday and Friday at 15:17 UTC. It can only create or improve approved declarative-engine apps and records accepted publishes in this ledger.

method.label: Inspect
method.description: Review the live site, repository, current apps, open feedback, bugs, depth, accessibility, and portfolio gaps.

method.label: Compare
method.description: Consider at least three candidate changes and choose the one that creates the strongest useful depth or breadth.

method.label: Build one
method.description: Create or improve one coherent feature or app, including mobile, keyboard, touch, reduced-motion, teardown, and edge cases.

method.label: Validate
method.description: Run JavaScript syntax checks, feedback-routing tests, registry rules, required-file checks, and safety-boundary validation.

method.label: Publish or skip
method.description: Merge and deploy only after every required check passes. Skip when the candidate is weak, unsafe, duplicative, or incomplete.

qualityGates: One coherent change maximum per review window
No secrets, trackers, accounts, hidden storage, or unreviewed network behavior
No direct execution of user feedback
Mobile, keyboard, touch, focus, and reduced-motion behavior considered
Repository validation must pass before main is published

queue.title: Clue Current
queue.reason: Adds an underserved deduction loop with branching cases, suspect selection, evidence collection, accusation timing, focus, suspicion, credibility, scoring, mobile-friendly controls, keyboard shortcuts, reduced-motion styling, and no network or storage behavior.

queue.title: Time Sense arcade ladder
queue.reason: Add session progression, risk choices, or challenge tiers around its strong timing mechanic without turning it into a shallow score skin.

queue.title: Pairadox two-player draft
queue.reason: Add a lightweight shared prompt-building loop with alternating ingredient picks and scoring, if it can stay local and accessible.

queue.title: Signal Garden remix rules
queue.reason: Add rule modifiers or unlockable pattern variants to improve replay value after the adaptive ten-round loop.

queue.title: Ambient Ambient
queue.reason: The idea needs microphone permission and a reviewed audio-analysis runtime, so it stays visible without bypassing the approved engine boundary.

recentDecisions.title: Clue Current 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a standalone local deduction game with three branching cases, suspect leads, evidence collection, focus cost, suspicion pressure, credibility, accusation timing, scoring, mobile-friendly controls, keyboard shortcuts, reduced-motion styling, and cleanup-free static behavior.

recentDecisions.title: Canopy Courier 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a standalone local ecological placement game with seed choices, water pressure, pollinators, canopy growth, blight recovery, route connectivity, scoring, responsive canvas rendering, touch, keyboard input, optional local audio, and cleanup.

recentDecisions.title: Pairadox progression loop 1.4.0
recentDecisions.summary: Expanded Pairadox with a five-stage session ladder, scoring sparks, streak bonuses, wildcards, recovery cuts, live card metadata, responsive layout, accessible buttons, reduced-motion handling, and local-only cleanup.

recentDecisions.title: Fair Choice group rounds 1.2.0
recentDecisions.summary: Expanded Fair Choice from a single fairness wheel into a deeper local group-round builder with one-pick and group modes, adjustable seats, no repeated seats inside a round, completed group history, stats, touch, keyboard, optional audio, reduced-motion support, and cleanup.

recentDecisions.title: Tiny Step depth 1.2.0
recentDecisions.summary: Expanded Tiny Step from a three-action trail into a deeper local planning loop with reset, focus, and stretch modes, obstacle guardrails, recovery cuts, effort values, momentum scoring, keyboard navigation, and a follow-up unlock.

recentDecisions.title: Harbor Balance 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a standalone local resource-management game with storm deadlines, district needs, cargo choices, fuel pressure, hazard repairs, trust, scoring, canvas rendering, touch, and keyboard input.

recentDecisions.title: Route Lab 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a standalone local path-planning puzzle with terrain costs, ordered relays, limited charge, scan and bridge tools, scoring, canvas rendering, touch, and keyboard input.

recentDecisions.title: Forge Control Room
recentDecisions.summary: Added a public schedule, process map, quality gates, candidate queue, sprint progress, and transparent publish-versus-skip explanation.

recentDecisions.title: Signal Garden 1.1.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a three-mode adaptive pattern-prediction game with moving canvas signals, scoring, hints, touch, keyboard, and optional audio.

recentDecisions.title: Constraint Spark 1.3.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added Explore and Three-card Sprint modes with timed rounds, scoring, a strategic swap, progress, and clean teardown.
